skill.name: security-audit
skill.description: Audit workbook security: password handling, approval bypass, sheet protection, access control

target.name: mod_Config
target.reason: MASTER_PWD stored as plaintext constant - all sheets use same password

target.name: mod_ApprovalWorkflow
target.reason: Approval status written directly to sheet - no role verification, no audit of approval action

target.name: mod_Database
target.reason: Sheet unprotect/protect cycle - vulnerable if error occurs between unprotect and re-protect

target.name: mod_StockEntry_Logic
target.reason: Transaction posting without user authentication - any user can post movements

target.name: mod_AuditTrail
target.reason: Audit log can be cleared via ClearAuditLogs - no admin-only restriction

target.name: mod_SheetSetup
target.reason: Local MASTER_PWD constant - if diverged from mod_Config, protection breaks silently

target.name: ARTICLES
target.reason: Contains pricing data (CMUP) - should be restricted

target.name: MOUVEMENTS
target.reason: Transaction ledger - should be append-only

actions.action: Verify all unprotect/protect cycles have matching pairs (no orphaned unprotect on error)
Check if approval workflow can be bypassed by direct sheet editing
Assess MASTER_PWD exposure risk (visible in VBA code, exportable)
Verify ClearAuditLogs requires confirmation or admin role

skill.name: refactoring
skill.description: Improve code quality: remove duplicates, extract common patterns, fix naming inconsistencies

target.name: Module1
target.reason: Duplicate of mod_Config - DELETE

target.name: Module2
target.reason: Duplicate of mod_Config - DELETE

target.name: mod_Config_Test
target.reason: Test stub - DELETE from production

target.name: mod_SheetSetup
target.reason: Local MASTER_PWD constant duplicates mod_Config.MASTER_PWD

target.name: mod_StockEntry_Logic
target.reason: 831 lines monolithic - extract validation logic, grid management, and posting logic into separate modules

target.name: mod_ExportEngine
target.reason: 622 lines - template population could be extracted to mod_TemplateEngine

target.name: mod_Utilities
target.reason: Mixed concerns: data utilities + UI utilities + export utilities

actions.action: Delete Module1, Module2, mod_Config_Test (verified dead code)
Replace mod_SheetSetup local MASTER_PWD with mod_Config.MASTER_PWD reference
Extract validation logic from mod_StockEntry_Logic to mod_Validation
Standardize Public keyword usage across all modules
Add XML docstrings to all public procedures

skill.name: testing
skill.description: Generate test harness for all public procedures with edge cases

target.name: mod_StockEngine
target.reason: Core calculation engine - test ROP, EOQ, CMUP with known inputs

target.name: mod_StockCalculations
target.reason: Standalone formulas - easy to unit test

target.name: mod_Utilities
target.reason: SafeVal, GetArticleField, IsValidDate - pure functions

target.name: mod_SyncBridge
target.reason: Transaction sync - test with mock data

target.name: mod_Localization
target.reason: String lookup - test with missing IDs, empty sheet

target.name: all
target.reason: Test each entry point with valid, invalid, and boundary inputs

actions.action: Create mod_TestHarness module with Test_ prefixed procedures
Test CalculateROP with D=1546, LT=2, SS=200 -> expect 205.6
Test CalculateEOQ with D=1546, S=500, H=0.2*unitPrice -> expect ~176
Test SafeVal with Null, Empty, "", "abc", 123 -> expect correct doubles
Test GetArticleField with non-existent SKU -> expect empty string
Test SyncTransactionInternal with invalid SKU -> expect graceful error

skill.name: data-validation
skill.description: Add validation layers to data entry and processing paths
skill.targets: <target type="sheet" name="MOUVEMENTS" reason="Add data validation: date <= today, quantity > 0, valid type codes" />

actions.action: Add quantity validation: must be > 0, integer for physical items
Add date validation: must not be in future, must be within fiscal year
Add duplicate reference check before posting
Add negative stock prevention (block sortie if insufficient stock)
Add CMUP validation: must be > 0, flag anomalies

skill.name: documentation
skill.description: Generate inline docstrings and external reference documentation

target.name: project-wide
target.reason: All modules need XML docstrings for public procedures

target.name: all
target.reason: Document sheet purpose, columns, data types, and relationships

target.name: mod_Config
target.reason: Document each constant with thesis reference and business meaning

actions.action: Add XML docstring header to each module (purpose, author, date, dependencies)
Add XML docstring to each public procedure (summary, params, returns, errors, example)
Generate sheet dictionary: name, purpose, columns with types, relationships
Generate config parameter reference with thesis citations
Create user manual: how to use each entry point

skill.name: database-schema-design
skill.description: Normalize sheet structure, add constraints, plan indexing strategy

target.name: ARTICLES
target.reason: Article catalog - primary key: Code Article, indexes on Category, ABC classification

target.name: MOUVEMENTS
target.reason: Transaction ledger - composite key: Date + Ref + Code Article, index on Type for filtering

target.name: AUDIT_LOG
target.reason: Append-only log - index on timestamp for time-range queries

actions.action: Verify ARTICLES has unique Code Article values
Verify MOUVEMENTS has consistent data types per column
Plan Table/ListObject conversion for structured references
Add named ranges for key columns (enables formula-based validation)

skill.name: ci-cd
skill.description: Automate VBA export, testing, and version management

target.name: mod_Backup
target.reason: Existing export functionality - can be enhanced for CI pipeline

target.name: build
target.reason: Export all modules to VBA_Modules directory on each save

target.name: version
target.reason: Auto-increment mod_Config.VERSION on each release

actions.action: Enhance mod_Backup to export to versioned folders (v13.2.1, v13.2.2, etc.)
Create pre-save hook that exports all modules to source control directory
Add version validation test (VERSION constant matches workbook metadata)
Create changelog template for each version

skill.name: context-injection
skill.description: Inject project context into AI agent sessions for accurate code generation

target.name: erp-project-context.xml
target.reason: Primary context file - read first in every session

target.name: mod_Config
target.reason: Contains all constants agents need to reference

target.name: erp-agent-handoff.xml
target.reason: Session handoff instructions for next agent

actions.action: On session start: read erp-project-context.xml before any code changes
Before code change: verify target module in dependency graph
After code change: update affected XML sections
On session end: regenerate erp-agent-handoff.xml with current state

skill.name: performance-optimization
skill.description: Optimize slow operations: ScreenUpdating, Calculation, Events management

target.name: mod_Database
target.reason: Already manages ScreenUpdating/Calculation/Events - verify all paths restore settings

target.name: mod_SyncBridge
target.reason: Batch operations on large datasets could be slow

target.name: mod_StockEngine
target.reason: CalculateCMUP loops through MOUVEMENTS - O(n) per article, O(n*m) total

target.name: mod_Reports
target.reason: GenerateMonthlyReport aggregates entire MOUVEMENTS sheet

actions.action: Verify all error paths restore Application.ScreenUpdating, Calculation, EnableEvents
Consider dictionary-based caching for repeated article lookups
Batch CMUP calculation: single pass through MOUVEMENTS instead of per-article passes
Add progress indicators for long-running operations (> 5 seconds)
